subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Aflakiyyih (Tablet of the Celestial Spheres)
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath ever caused His Names and Attributes to penetrate the degrees of existence
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی جعل اسمائه و صفاته لم یزل نافذه احکامها فی مراتب الوجود
subcodes.subjects: @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @infinity and eternity, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @microcosm and macrocosm ['alam-i-akbar and 'alam-i-asghar], @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
